summary: Self-hosted FastAPI webhook receiver. Verifies GitHub PR review-comment webhooks, asks a cheap LLM to fix/dismiss/skip each Copilot comment, then pushes verified SSH-signed commits attributed to the user. Multi-instance (github.com + GHE). No GitHub Actions, no bot author.
entrypoints: src/main.py:create_app (FastAPI factory; Dockerfile CMD: uvicorn main:create_app --factory)

routes.POST /webhook: HMAC-verified GitHub event ingress; dedupes by delivery-id; returns 202; processes in background
routes.POST /process: manual re-walk of a PR (X-Trigger-Token auth, bypasses INVOLVED_USERS, all authors)
routes.POST /setup-webhook: programmatically register webhook on repo or org (matches GHE host via PAT routing)

main.purpose: FastAPI app factory + all HTTP handlers; wires settings, GH client, LLM, dedupe, slack, signing.

processor.purpose: Core triage loop. Clones PR branch, walks unresolved Copilot threads, calls LLM, applies file changes, makes signed commit, pushes, resolves thread. Hosts post-webhook sweep (handles every comment from a single trigger). After our push, runs `_resolve_merge_conflicts` as a follow-up: unshallow + fetch base, attempt merge, on conflict ask LLM for full resolved files, commit signed, push again. Kill-switch: settings.merge_conflict_resolution.

github_client.purpose: REST + GraphQL client. Supports github.com and arbitrary GHE host. Verifies HMAC signatures. Multi-instance routing via find_instance_for_host / find_instance_for_payload.

config.purpose: Frozen Settings dataclass loaded from env. Required secrets fail-fast at boot. Multi-instance: github.com always on; GHE only if GHE_HOST + GHE_PAT + GHE_AUTHOR_* all set.

dedupe.purpose: SQLite-backed seen-delivery store. Survives pod restarts via PVC. Used to drop GitHub webhook retries.

signing.purpose: Installs SSH ed25519 signing key at 0600 into ~/.ssh; configures per-repo git user/signing so commits show as verified.

slack.purpose: Optional Slack notifier (chat.postMessage). No-op when SLACK_BOT_TOKEN or SLACK_CHANNEL_ID unset. Returns permalink for run tracking.

triggers.purpose: In-memory + persisted store of /process trigger runs, surfaced via /runs and /process/{id}.

llm.purpose: Provider abstraction. Two prompt/response shapes: `decide(CommentContext) -> Decision` (fix/dismiss/skip) for triage, and `resolve_merge(MergeConflictContext) -> MergeResolution` (resolve/abort) for follow-up merge resolution. Providers share a `_chat(system, user) -> str` method so both flows reuse one HTTP call. Providers: DeepSeek, OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter (OpenAI-compatible base for three of them).

callgraph_highlights.note: Webhook hot path. Verify -> dedupe -> 202 immediately -> background process_jobs.
Per-PR lock prevents concurrent push races (v1.6.1 fix). Sweep variant in v1.8.0 walks every unresolved thread on the PR after the webhook trigger.
Bypasses BOT_LOGINS allowlist and INVOLVED_USERS whitelist. Bot replies carry hidden <!-- comment-commander --> marker so re-runs never loop.
Routes by host to pick PAT (github.com vs GHE); requires admin:repo_hook or admin:org_hook on the matched PAT.
Subject derived from Decision.commit_message (Conventional Commits). Each actionable comment = one signed commit; no squashing.

Post-push follow-up inside _process_pr_locked. Loop-safe (single trigger). On conflict, full file contents with markers go to LLM; LLM returns full resolved content or aborts. Partial coverage from LLM is treated as abort. `git merge --abort` on every failure path so PR stays consistent.

hotspots: src/processor.py — biggest churn; triage loop, sweep, locking, commit/push, merge resolution
src/main.py — endpoint handlers; most route additions land here
src/github_client.py — REST/GraphQL surface; new GH features land here
src/llm/providers.py — provider configs; default models; shared _chat()
src/llm/base.py — prompt builders + JSON parsers (triage + merge)
tests/conftest.py — fixtures that mock GH, LLM, signing

infra.deploy: k8s/overlays/prod (kustomize); ExternalSecrets from OCI vault + OnePasswordItem for signing key
infra.image: ghcr.io/magmamoose/comment-commander:v* via semantic-release, multi-arch via docker-bake.hcl

stack: Python 3.12, FastAPI 0.115, uvicorn, httpx, pytest+respx; deps in requirements.txt / requirements-dev.txt
